ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the stock */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Full name of the company */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the company operates in */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company is part of */,
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* ID of the exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number */,
  "cusip" TEXT /* Committee on Uniform Security Identification Procedures */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Date of initial public offering */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Current market capitalization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_exchange_id FOREIGN KEY ("exchange_id") REFERENCES exchanges ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "exchange_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock exchange */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the exchange */,
  "found_date" TEXT /* Date when the exchange was founded */,
  "mic" TEXT /* Market Identifier Code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock this price record belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price record */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume on that date */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price on that date */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price on that date */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price reached on that date */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price reached on that date */,
  "adjclose" REAL /* Adjusted closing price */,
  "dividend" REAL /* Dividend payment on that date */,
  "split_coefficient" REAL /* Stock split coefficient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., API, CSV file) */,
  "api_endpoint" TEXT /* API endpoint or file location */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for authentication */,
  "update_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data updates */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validation_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation log */,
  "price_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock price record being validated */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date when validation was performed */,
  "is_valid" INTEGER /* Indicates if the data is valid */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes on the validation process */,
  "error_code" TEXT /* Error code if validation failed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validation_logs_price_id FOREIGN KEY ("price_id") REFERENCES stock_prices ("price_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market trend */,
  "trend_name" TEXT /* Name of the trend */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trend */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the trend observation */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the trend observation */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of trend (e.g., bull, bear, sideways) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytical_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., technical, fundamental) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytical_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity_logs" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, report generation) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the activity */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the activity was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualization_configs" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization config */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report this config belongs to */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., chart, table) */,
  "chart_type" TEXT /* Type of chart (e.g., line, bar, scatter) */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions for the visualization */,
  "metrics" TEXT /* Metrics for the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualization_configs_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES analytical_reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_revisions" (
  "revision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revision */,
  "price_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock price record being revised */,
  "revision_date" TEXT /* Date when the revision was made */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the revision */,
  "change_details" TEXT /* Details of the changes made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_revisions_price_id FOREIGN KEY ("price_id") REFERENCES stock_prices ("price_id")
)
